commands.help: Add a user to a domain group
commands.long_help: Adds the specified user to the specified group on a domain controller. Domain groups only. Use empty string for server to target the local machine, or empty string for domain to target a local account.

arguments.name: domain
arguments.desc: Domain for the user account. Use empty string for local account

arguments.name: server
arguments.desc: Target computer to perform the addition on. Use empty string for local machine

arguments.name: username
arguments.desc: User to add to the group

arguments.name: groupname
arguments.desc: Group to add the user to
